title: Kollegiet
description: Create themed modpack with a focus on exploration.
body:
A Create mod based modpack with a little spice in the form of Alex' Caves.
To make things a little more interesting, this modpack also includes the likes of "Thirst was Taken" and "Thin Air", because wheres the fun in making it too easy😜

This is a pack for both those who seek to venture out and conquer the caves of the world, and for those who want to create the best factory of them all!


(I plan to make a questline to go with this pack, but it's still early in development)
